experience.title: Data Analytics Lead
bullets: Spearhead DIY analytics initiatives to democratize data access and empower business users through citizen-developed solutions using Microsoft Power Platform.
Collaborate with business stakeholders to scope challenges, define KPIs, and align analytics solutions with broader organizational strategy.
Design and deliver dashboards and visualizations tailored for senior leadership, driving timely and impactful business outcomes.
Evaluate operational decisions through risk assessments and historical learnings, connecting insights across initiatives to support strategic goals.
Champion standardization and automation of analytics processes, integrating AI-driven efficiencies to scale impact across teams.
Led end-to-end data science projects from problem definition to deployment, delivering predictive models and actionable insights.
Citizen Data Scientist Enablement Program — Designed and implemented a company-wide initiative to train non-technical employees in building data solutions using Power BI and Power Apps.
Automated Business Insights Engine — Developed a low-code solution that automates weekly reporting and alerts for key business metrics, reducing manual effort by 60%.

experience.title: Data Scientist
bullets: Manage and mentor team members on KPI definition, logical model design, and technical documentation for Alteryx workflows supporting Power BI reports.
Hands-on experience with Alteryx — Predictive, Parsing, and Transforms.
Develop analytical models using specialised tools based on business problem and data availability.
Delivered end-to-end AI solution for Electrical Submersible Pump (ESP) on cloud platform C3.ai; created Power BI dashboard giving leadership a consolidated view of ESP performance.
Performed uni-variate anomaly detection on wind turbine sensor data.
Automated the DDMRP (Demand Driven Material Requirements Planning) report in Alteryx.
Automated the Special Pricing Process for a lubricant business line in Alteryx, removing manual intervention at each stage.
Worked on Working Capital estimation for Gulf of Mexico asset using ARIMA and other forecasting models.

experience.title: Data Specialist (HR Analytics)
bullets: Specialised in text mining for HR contact centre data (Voice of Customer analytics) using SPSS Modeler & Watson Analytics.
HR Contact Centre Profitability Analysis — text mining to identify patterns and develop solutions that reduced contact centre case volumes.
HR Analysis — used SPSS Modeler to find areas of improvement in client HR processes (Air Canada, BMW, P&G).
Analysed data from the Insights feature in IBM Watson dashboard and applied findings across multiple projects.

Recognised with Manager's Choice Award 2017 for 'Dare to Create Original Ideas' — produced a client-facing explainer video of the Voice of Customer analytics workflow, later adopted for business acquisition.

Scheduled in-person data collection centres across the departments.
Analysed 1,000 student records and arrived at insights for the college planning committee.
